ranked_scenarios.summary: Fix clicking the tree edge is ineffective

closed_issues.summary: Clicking the tree edge is ineffective

description.text:
### Tested versions

v4.6dev
v4.5

### System information

Windows11

### Issue description

Clicking the tree edge is ineffective. TreeItems in edge could be displayed but could not be clicked.
Both modern and classical themes have the same mistake. Modern theme have larger edge width, So it is more pronounced in modern.
Modern:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5d12f5d1-60dd-4868-8cb5-142b13e448e5)

Classic:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d5148eb1-dbff-4136-b1eb-04d815a8bf95)



### Steps to reproduce

Follow GIFs.

### Minimal reproduction project (MRP)

N/A
